title: Claude Code Unpacked : A visual guide
content: Claude Code Unpacked Claude Code Unpacked Y Featured on Hacker News What actually happens when you type a message into Claude Code? The agent loop, 50+ tools, multi-agent orchestration, and unreleased features , mapped straight from the source. 0 + Files 0 K+ Lines of Code 0 + Tools 0 + Commands Start exploring ↓ 01 The Agent Loop From keypress to rendered response, step by step through the source. 1 Input 2 Message 3 History 4 System 5 API 6 Tokens 7 Tools? 8 Loop 9 Render 10 Hooks 11 Await 1 Input 2 Message 3 History 4 System 5 API 6 Tokens 7 Tools? 8 Loop 9 Render 10 Hooks 11 Await Watch what happens when you send a message to Claude Code 1 User Input src/components/TextInput.tsx User types a message or pipes input through stdin ● claude-code $ Keyboard input comes from Ink's TextInput component. In non-interactive mode, it reads from piped stdin instead. 1 / 11 0.5 x 1 x 2 x 02 Architecture Explorer Click around the source tree to explore what's inside. File Operations 6 tools FileRead FileEdit FileWrite Glob Grep NotebookEdit Execution 3 tools Bash PowerShell REPL Search & Fetch 4 tools WebBrowser 🔒 WebFetch WebSearch ToolSearch Agents & Tasks 11 tools Agent SendMessage TaskCreate TaskGet TaskList TaskUpdate TaskStop TaskOutput TeamCreate TeamDelete ListPeers 🔒 Planning 5 tools EnterPlanMode ExitPlanMode EnterWorktree ExitWorktree VerifyPlanExecution 🔒 MCP 4 tools mcp ListMcpResources ReadMcpResource McpAuth System 11 tools AskUserQuestion TodoWrite Skill Config RemoteTrigger 🔒 CronCreate 🔒 CronDelete 🔒 CronList 🔒 Snip 🔒 Workflow 🔒 TerminalCapture 🔒 Experimental 8 tools Sleep SendUserMessage StructuredOutput 🔒 LSP 🔒 SendUserFile 🔒 PushNotification 🔒 Monitor 🔒 SubscribePR 🔒 Click a tool to see details and source code 04 Command Catalog Every slash command available in Claude Code, sorted by what it does. Setup & Config 12 /init /login /logout /config /permissions /model /theme /terminal-setup /doctor /onboarding /mcp /hooks Daily Workflow 24 /compact /memory /context /plan /resume /session /files /add-dir /copy /export /summary /clear /brief /output-style 🔒 /color /vim /keybindings /skills /tasks /agents /fast /effort /extra-usage /rate-limit-options Code Review & Git 13 /review /commit /commit-push-pr /diff /pr_comments /branch /issue /security-review /autofix-pr 🔒 /share /install-github-app 🔒 /install-slack-app 🔒 /tag Debugging & Diagnostics 23 /status /stats /cost /usage /version /feedback /think-back /thinkback-play /rewind /ctx_viz /debug-tool-call /perf-issue /heapdump /ant-trace /backfill-sessions 🔒 /break-cache 🔒 /bridge-kick 🔒 /mock-limits 🔒 /oauth-refresh 🔒 /reset-lim
summary_zh: Claude Code Unpacked：一份可视化指南，当你在Claude Code中输入信息时，背后发生了什么？这份指南直接从源代码出发，揭示了其内部运作机制，包括智能体循环、超过50种工具、多智能体编排以及一些未发布的功能。，核心流程：智能体循环，从按键到渲染响应，整个过程被分解为11个步骤：1. 用户输入；2. 消息处理；3. 历史记录；4. 系统指令；5. API调用；6. 令牌处理；7. 工具判断；8. 循环执行；9. 渲染输出；10. 钩子函数；11. 等待交互。在交互模式下，输入来自Ink的TextInput组件；在非交互模式下，则从标准输入（stdin）读取。，架构总览，项目包含超过数千行代码和数百个文件，主要模块包括：，- 工具与命令：核心功能集。，- 核心处理：主要的逻辑处理层。，- UI层：用户界面组件。，- 基础设施：底层支持服务。，- 支持与工具类：实用功能。，- 个性与用户体验：交互与体验优化。，工具系统详解，Claude Code内置了超过50种工具，按功能分类：，- 文件操作：包括FileRead、FileEdit、FileWrite、Glob、Grep、NotebookEdit等6种工具。，- 执行：包含Bash、PowerShell、REPL等3种工具。，- 搜索与获取：包括WebBrowser（需授权）、WebFetch、WebSearch、ToolSearch等4种工具。，- 智能体与任务：包含Agent、SendMessage、TaskCreate、TaskGet、TaskList、TaskUpdate、TaskStop、TaskOutput、TeamCreate、TeamDelete、ListPeers（需授权）等11种工具。，- 规划：包含EnterPlanMode、ExitPlanMode、EnterWorktree、ExitWorktree、VerifyPlanExecution（需授权）等5种工具。，- MCP：包含mcp、ListMcpResources、ReadMcpResource、McpAuth等4种工具。，- 系统：包含AskUserQuestion、TodoWrite、Skill、Config、RemoteTrigger（需授权）等11种工具。，- 实验性功能：包含Sleep、SendUserMessage、StructuredOutput（需授权）等8种工具。，命令目录，Claude Code提供了丰富的斜杠命令，主要类别包括：，- 设置与配置：如 /init, /login, /config, /model, /mcp 等12个命令。，- 日常工作流：如 /compact, /memory, /plan, /files, /summary, /tasks, /agents 等24个命令。，- 代码审查与Git：如 /review, /commit, /diff, /pr_comments, /security-review 等13个命令。，- 调试与诊断：如 /status, /stats, /cost, /think-back, /debug-tool-call 等23个命令。，该项目通过清晰的架构、丰富的工具集和命令系统，构建了一个功能强大且可深度探索的AI编程助手环境。

title: Claude Wrote a Full FreeBSD Remote Kernel RCE with Root Shell (CVE-2026-4747)
content: publications/MADBugs/CVE-2026-4747/write-up.md at main · califio/publications · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert califio / publications Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 17 Star 79 Files Expand file tree main / write-up.md Copy path Blame More file actions Blame More file actions Latest commit History History History 682 lines (524 loc) · 33 KB main / write-up.md Top File metadata and controls Preview Code Blame 682 lines (524 loc) · 33 KB Raw Copy raw file Download raw file Outline Edit and raw actions CVE-2026-4747 — FreeBSD kgssapi.ko RPCSEC_GSS Stack Buffer Overflow Full Remote Kernel RCE → uid 0 Reverse Shell Advisory: FreeBSD-SA-26:08.rpcsec_gss CVE: CVE-2026-4747 Affected: FreeBSD 13.5 (<p11), 14.3 (<p10), 14.4 (<p1), 15.0 (<p5) Tested on: FreeBSD 14.4-RELEASE amd64 (GENERIC kernel, no KASLR) Attack surface: NFS server with kgssapi.ko loaded (port 2049/TCP) 1. The Vulnerability Root Cause In sys/rpc/rpcsec_gss/svc_rpcsec_gss.c , the function svc_rpc_gss_validate() reconstructs an RPC header into a 128-byte stack buffer ( rpchdr[] ) for GSS-API signature verification. It first writes 32 bytes of fixed RPC header fields, then copies the entire RPCSEC_GSS credential body ( oa_length bytes) into the remaining space — without checking that oa_length fits . static bool_t svc_rpc_gss_validate ( struct svc_rpc_gss_client * client , struct rpc_msg * msg , gss_qop_t * qop , rpc_gss_proc_t gcproc ) { int32_t rpchdr [ 128 / sizeof ( int32_t )]; // 128 bytes on stack int32_t * buf ; memset ( rpchdr , 0 , sizeof ( rpchdr )); // Write 8 fixed-size RPC header fields (32 bytes total) buf = rpchdr ; IXDR_PUT_LONG ( buf , msg -> rm_xid ); IXDR_PUT_ENUM ( buf , msg -> rm_direction ); IXDR_PUT_LONG ( buf , msg -> rm_call . cb_rpcvers ); IXDR_PUT_LONG ( buf , msg -> rm_call . cb_prog ); IXDR_PUT_LONG ( buf , msg -> rm_call . cb_vers ); IXDR_PUT_LONG ( buf , msg -> rm_call . cb_proc ); oa = & msg -> rm_call . cb_cred ; IXDR_PUT_ENUM ( buf , oa -> oa_flavor ); IXDR_PUT_LONG ( buf , oa -> oa_length ); if ( oa -> oa_length ) { // BUG: No bounds check on oa_length! // After 32 bytes of header, only 96 bytes remain in rpchdr. // If oa_length > 96, this overflows past rpchdr into: // local variables → saved callee-saved registers → return address memcpy (( caddr_t ) buf , oa -> oa_base , oa -> oa_length ); buf += RNDUP ( oa -> oa_length ) / sizeof ( int32_t ); } // gss_verify_mic() called after — but overflow already happened } The buffer has only 128 - 32 = 96 bytes of space for the credential body. Any credential larger than 96 bytes overflows the stack buffer. The Fix (14.4-RELEASE-p1) The patch adds a single bounds check before the copy: oa = & msg -> rm_call . cb_cred ; if ( oa -> oa_length
title_zh: Claude编写了完整的FreeBSD远程内核RCE漏洞利用程序并获取Root权限（CVE-2026-4747）
summary_zh: 近日，安全研究人员披露了FreeBSD内核中的一个高危漏洞CVE-2026-4747。该漏洞存在于`kgssapi.ko`内核模块的RPCSEC_GSS实现中，是一个栈缓冲区溢出漏洞，可导致远程内核代码执行并最终获得root权限的交互式shell。受影响的版本包括FreeBSD 13.5（p11之前）、14.3（p10之前）、14.4（p1之前）和15.0（p5之前）。攻击面为加载了`kgssapi.ko`模块的NFS服务器（端口2049/TCP）。，漏洞的根本原因位于`sys/rpc/rpcsec_gss/svc_rpcsec_gss.c`文件的`svc_rpc_gss_validate()`函数中。该函数在验证GSS-API签名时，会先将32字节的固定RPC头部字段写入一个128字节的栈缓冲区（`rpchdr[]`），然后紧接着将整个RPCSEC_GSS凭证体（`oa_length`字节）复制到剩余空间中。问题在于，复制前缺少对`oa_length`的边界检查。栈缓冲区在存放32字节头部后，仅剩96字节空间用于存放凭证体。如果攻击者构造的凭证体长度超过96字节，就会导致栈缓冲区溢出，覆盖栈上的局部变量、被调用者保存的寄存器以及函数返回地址，从而在后续调用`gss_verify_mic()`之前就实现了控制流劫持。，在修复版本（如14.4-RELEASE-p1）中，补丁在复制操作前添加了边界检查：`if (oa->oa_length > sizeof(rpchdr) - 32) return (FALSE);`，确保凭证体长度不会超出可用空间。，此漏洞的特别之处在于，整个漏洞的发现、分析和利用代码的撰写过程均由Anthropic的AI助手Claude完成。研究人员仅提供了初始的漏洞公告和补丁链接，Claude便自主完成了对补丁的逆向分析、漏洞原理的深入理解，并最终编写出完整的远程内核利用代码。该利用代码能够绕过ASLR（地址空间布局随机化）和SMAP（管理模式访问保护），在目标系统上实现稳定的远程代码执行，并返回一个root权限的交互式shell。这一案例展示了高级LLM在漏洞研究和利用开发领域的潜在能力。

title: The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode
content: The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode, and more | Alex Kim's blog Table of Contents Anti-distillation: injecting fake tools to poison copycats Undercover mode: AI that hides its AI Frustration detection via regex (yes, regex) Native client attestation below the JS runtime 250,000 wasted API calls per day KAIROS: the unreleased autonomous agent mode Other stuff So what? Update: see HN discussions about this post: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47586778 I use Claude Code daily, so when Chaofan Shou noticed earlier today that Anthropic had shipped a .map file alongside their Claude Code npm package, one containing the full, readable source code of the CLI tool, I immediately wanted to look inside. The package has since been pulled, but not before the code was widely mirrored, including myself and picked apart on Hacker News . This is Anthropic’s second accidental exposure in a week (the model spec leak was just days ago), and some people on Twitter are starting to wonder if someone inside is doing this on purpose. Probably not, but it’s a bad look either way. The timing is hard to ignore: just ten days ago, Anthropic sent legal threats to OpenCode , forcing them to remove built-in Claude authentication because third-party tools were using Claude Code’s internal APIs to access Opus at subscription rates instead of pay-per-token pricing. That whole saga makes some of the findings below more pointed. So I spent my morning reading through the HN comments and leaked source. Here’s what I found, roughly ordered by how “spicy” I thought it was. Anti-distillation: injecting fake tools to poison copycats # In claude.ts (line 301-313) , there’s a flag called ANTI_DISTILLATION_CC . When enabled, Claude Code sends anti_distillation: ['fake_tools'] in its API requests. This tells the server to silently inject decoy tool definitions into the system prompt. The idea: if someone is recording Claude Code’s API traffic to train a competing model, the fake tools pollute that training data. It’s gated behind a GrowthBook feature flag ( tengu_anti_distill_fake_tool_injection ) and only active for first-party CLI sessions. This was one of the first things people noticed on HN. There’s also a second anti-distillation mechanism in betas.ts (lines 279-298) , server-side connector-text summarization. When enabled, the API buffers the assistant’s text between tool calls, summarizes it, and returns the summary with a cryptographic signature. On subsequent turns, the original text can be restored from the signature. If you’re recording API traffic, you only get the summaries, not the full reasoning chain. How hard would it be to work around these? Not very. Looking at the activation logic in claude.ts , the fake tools injection requires all four conditions to be true: the ANTI_DISTILLATION_CC compile-time flag, the cli entrypoint, a first-party API provider, and the tengu_anti_distill_fake_tool_injection GrowthBook flag returning tr
title_zh: Claude代码源泄露事件：虚假工具、挫败正则表达式与卧底模式
summary_zh: 近日，Anthropic公司旗下Claude Code工具的源代码因.map文件意外泄露，其npm包中包含了完整的可读CLI源代码。尽管该包已被撤回，但代码已被广泛镜像和解析。这已是Anthropic一周内第二次意外泄露（此前模型规格也已泄露）。此次泄露恰逢Anthropic向OpenCode发出法律威胁，要求其移除内置Claude认证，因第三方工具利用Claude Code内部API以订阅费率访问Opus模型，而非按token付费。，泄露的代码揭示了多项技术细节与内部机制。最引人注目的是“反蒸馏”技术：当启用ANTI_DISTILLATION_CC标志时，Claude Code会在API请求中发送anti_distillation: ['fake_tools']，指示服务器在系统提示中静默注入虚假工具定义。此举旨在污染竞争对手通过记录API流量获取的训练数据。该功能受GrowthBook功能标志控制，仅在第一方CLI会话中激活。另一项反蒸馏机制位于betas.ts中，通过服务器端连接器文本摘要实现：API会在工具调用间缓冲助手文本，生成加密签名的摘要返回，后续轮次可通过签名恢复原文，从而防止完整推理链被记录。，代码中还包含“卧底模式”，使AI能够隐藏其AI身份，以及通过正则表达式检测用户挫败感的技术。此外，存在原生客户端认证机制，运行于JavaScript运行时之下，并提及每日约25万次API调用被浪费。泄露内容还涉及未发布的自主代理模式KAIROS。，这些发现揭示了AI公司在保护核心技术与应对数据抓取方面的策略，包括主动污染训练数据、控制推理链可见性等。尽管反蒸馏机制可通过分析激活逻辑规避，但其反映了行业对模型蒸馏与数据复制的防御态势。此次泄露为外界提供了罕见视角，以观察领先AI公司如何在实际产品中实施技术保护与用户体验管理。

title: CEO of largest public hospital says he's ready to replace radiologists with AI
title_zh: 最大公立医院CEO表示已准备好用AI取代放射科医生
summary_zh: 新加坡最大公立医疗集团的新任首席执行官表示，他已准备好用人工智能取代放射科医生。这一表态引发了医疗行业关于AI在放射学领域角色的广泛讨论。，该CEO指出，当前AI在图像分析方面的能力已足够成熟，能够执行许多传统上由放射科医生完成的任务，例如解读X光、CT和MRI扫描结果。他认为，AI系统可以更快、更准确地分析医学影像，减少人为错误，并缓解放射科医生短缺的压力。，技术层面，此类AI通常基于深度学习模型，经过大量标注的医学影像数据训练，能够检测异常、识别病变并提供初步诊断建议。一些先进的AI工具甚至能整合患者病史和其他临床数据，以支持更全面的评估。，然而，这一激进愿景也面临挑战。包括诊断责任归属、患者对AI诊断的接受度、系统在复杂或罕见病例中的可靠性，以及放射科医生角色转型等问题仍需解决。许多专家强调，AI更可能作为辅助工具增强放射科医生的工作效率，而非完全取代人类专业判断。，该言论凸显了医疗AI快速发展的趋势及其对传统医疗岗位的潜在冲击。未来，医疗体系可能需要重新定义放射科医生的职责，并建立相应的AI监管与临床应用标准。

title: From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem
content: The Weight of Remembering This one leans more technical than our usual Sci-Fi Saturday fare. Stick with it, we get to the sci-fi by the end. What KV Cache Actually Is Someone types a forty-three-character question into ChatGPT, some throwaway query about dinner recipes or the capital of Mongolia. Before the first word of the response appears, those characters have been split into tokens, each token multiplied through billions of parameters to produce three vectors: a query, a key, and a value. The key-value pairs land in GPU memory, where they sit physically as bytes on a chip. That stored state is the model's awareness of the conversation, not a metaphor but a memory address. The key-value cache exists for a practical reason. Without it, generating each new token would require reprocessing every previous token in the conversation from scratch. A 2,000-token exchange would mean re-reading the entire history 2,000 times. The KV cache eliminates that redundancy. Once a token's key-value pair is computed and stored, it stays. The next token only needs to attend to what's already cached. Computation drops from quadratic to linear. Sebastian Raschka's LLM Architecture Gallery visualizes this mechanism across dozens of model families, and the numbers attached to each architecture make the weight tangible. GPT-2's KV cache costs 300 KiB per token in Raschka's comparison. That means a 4,000-token conversation occupies roughly 1.2 GB of GPU memory just for the cache, separate from the model weights themselves. Micron's engineering blog describes the KV cache as the point where "buzzword meets bottom line," and they're right. Every conversation has a physical cost measured in bytes, in watts, in cooling costs, in dollars per hour of GPU rental. Your conversation weighs something and takes up space, and when the session ends, that space gets reclaimed and everything stored there vanishes. How Memory Evolved The way models handle their KV cache has changed four times in six years, and each change says something about what the designers thought was worth remembering. The numbers below come from Raschka's architecture comparisons . GPT-2 (2019) used multi-head attention in its simplest form. Every attention head maintained its own independent set of keys and values. The cost: 300 KiB per token. Every head remembered everything in its own way, with no sharing and no shortcuts. As Raschka details in Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch) , this was the straightforward design. Attention heads and memory were both cheap, so the design just remembered everything. Llama 3 (2024) adopted grouped-query attention, or GQA, across all model sizes. Instead of giving every query head its own key-value pair, multiple query heads share the same keys and values. The result: 128 KiB per token. Less than half GPT-2's per-token cost with almost no quality loss. Raschka's ablation summary notes that GQA performs comparably to full multi-head attention on standard benchmarks.
title_zh: 从每令牌300KB到69KB：LLM架构如何解决KV缓存问题
summary_zh: 从每令牌300KB到69KB：LLM架构如何解决KV缓存问题，KV缓存本质上是大语言模型（LLM）用于记录对话历史的物理内存状态。当用户输入被转换为令牌后，模型会为每个令牌计算并存储查询、键和值三个向量。这些键值对（KV）驻留在GPU内存中，构成了模型对当前会话的“记忆”。其核心价值在于避免冗余计算：若无KV缓存，生成每个新令牌都需要从头重新处理之前的所有令牌，导致计算量呈二次方增长；而有了缓存，计算量降至线性，只需关注已存储的键值对。，然而，KV缓存带来了显著的内存开销。根据Sebastian Raschka的LLM架构对比数据，GPT-2的KV缓存成本高达每令牌300KB。这意味着一次4000令牌的对话仅缓存就需要占用约1.2GB的GPU内存，这直接转化为硬件成本、能耗和运营费用。，过去六年中，KV缓存的处理方式经历了四代演进，反映了设计者对效率与性能的权衡：，1. GPT-2（2019）采用标准的多头注意力机制，每个注意力头独立维护一套键值对，无共享，成本为每令牌300KB。，2. Llama 3（2024）全面采用分组查询注意力（GQA），让多个查询头共享同一组键值，将成本降低至每令牌128KB，在几乎不影响质量的前提下将内存占用减半。，3. 进一步优化中，一些架构通过更激进的共享策略（如MQA）或创新设计（如Transformer的滑动窗口注意力），将成本降至约69KB每令牌。，这些架构演进表明，LLM正从“记住一切”的初始设计转向更高效、集约的内存管理。KV缓存优化不仅是技术挑战，也直接关系到AI服务的可扩展性与经济性，体现了模型设计中“性能与成本”的核心平衡。

title: Show HN: Claude Code rewritten as a bash script
content: GitHub - jdcodes1/claude-sh: Claude Code rewritten as a bash script. ~1500 lines, zero npm packages. Just curl + jq. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert jdcodes1 / claude-sh Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 7 Star 37 main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 1 Commit 1 Commit lib lib .gitignore .gitignore README.md README.md claude.sh claude.sh View all files Repository files navigation claude.sh Claude Code rewritten as a bash script. ~1,500 lines. Zero npm packages. Why The original Claude Code is ~380,000 lines of TypeScript with 266 npm dependencies. This does the same core job in bash with just curl and jq . Features Real-time streaming via FIFO pipe — text appears as Claude generates it 6 tools : Bash, Read, Edit, Write, Glob, Grep Tool chaining — up to 25 tool calls per turn Permission prompting — asks before running non-safe commands ( y/n/a ) CLAUDE.md loading — reads project instructions from CLAUDE.md files up the directory tree Git-aware context — branch, status, and recent commits in system prompt Session save/resume — auto-saves on exit, resume with --resume <id> Retry with backoff — exponential retry on 429/529 rate limits Cost tracking — per-turn and session totals Spinner — with the original spinner verbs (Clauding, Flibbertigibbeting, etc.) Slash commands — /help , /cost , /model , /clear , /save , /resume , /commit , /diff Pipe mode — echo "explain this" | ./claude.sh Install git clone https://github.com/jdcodes1/claude.sh.git cd claude.sh chmod +x claude.sh Dependencies curl jq Optional: rg (ripgrep) for better search Optional: python3 for the edit tool Usage export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY= " sk-ant-... " ./claude.sh Environment Variables Variable Default Description ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (required) Your Anthropic API key CLAUDE_MODEL claude-sonnet-4-20250514 Model to use CLAUDE_MAX_TOKENS 8192 Max output tokens ANTHROPIC_API_URL https://api.anthropic.com API base URL CLAUDE_SH_PERMISSIONS ask Permission mode: ask , allow , or deny Commands /help — Show help /cost — Show session cost /model — Show/change model /clear — Clear conversation /save — Save current session /resume — List/resume saved sessions /commit — Auto-generate a git commit /diff — Show git diff /quit — Exit Resume a Session # List saved sessions ./claude.sh > /resume # Resume by number > /resume 1 # Resume from CLI ./claude.sh --resume 20240101-120000-12345 Architecture claude.sh # Main REPL loop, slash commands, process_turn() lib/ api.sh # Anthropic API client, SSE streaming via FIFO, retry json.sh # Message construction, session persistence, CLAUDE.md, git context tools.sh # 6 tool implementatio
title_zh: Show HN：Claude Code 重写为 bash 脚本
summary_zh: 项目“claude-sh”将Claude Code工具重写为Bash脚本，代码量约1500行，无需任何npm依赖包，仅需curl和jq即可运行。原版Claude Code包含约38万行TypeScript代码和266个npm依赖，而此版本在Bash环境下实现了相同的核心功能。，核心功能包括：通过FIFO管道实现实时流式输出，文本随Claude生成逐字显示；提供6种工具（Bash、Read、Edit、Write、Glob、Grep），支持每轮最多25次工具调用链式操作；在运行非安全命令前进行权限提示（y/n/a）；支持沿目录树向上读取CLAUDE.md文件以加载项目指令；集成Git感知上下文，在系统提示中包含分支、状态和近期提交信息；支持会话保存与恢复（退出时自动保存，可通过--resume <id>恢复）；在遇到429/529速率限制时采用指数退避重试机制；提供每轮及会话总成本跟踪；保留原始风格的动态提示词（如“Clauding”）；内置多种斜杠命令（/help、/cost、/model、/clear、/save、/resume、/commit、/diff等）；支持管道模式（如echo "explain this" | ./claude.sh）。，安装方式简单，通过git克隆仓库并赋予执行权限即可。必需依赖为curl和jq，ripgrep（rg）和python3为可选依赖，用于增强搜索和编辑工具功能。使用前需设置环境变量ANTHROPIC_API_KEY（Anthropic API密钥），并可自定义模型、最大输出令牌数等参数。，项目架构清晰：主脚本claude.sh负责REPL循环、斜杠命令处理和轮次流程；lib/目录下的api.sh处理Anthropic API调用及SSE流式传输；json.sh负责消息构建、会话持久化及Git上下文；tools.sh则实现6种工具的具体逻辑。该工具为在轻量级Bash环境中高效利用Claude的代码生成与分析能力提供了简洁而强大的解决方案。

title: Accidentally created my first fork bomb with Claude Code
content: February 2026 P1: $3800 Claude API Bill and a Fork Bomb | droppedasbaby - engineering blog | home of swe word vomit Friday, Feb 27, ~11:00AM # I start my workday late, around 11. I sit at my desk and shake the mouse - nothing. “huh, that’s weird. why is this stupid thing not starting up?” I press a few random keys on my keyboard - nothing. I push the fingerprint sensor - nothing. “seriously?” I tap on the trackpad. No haptic feedback. Completely unresponsive. “maybe there is something loose from cable managing last night?” I check the cables, everything’s plugged-in. I try to force restart the computer, but it’s warm… no, it’s hot. “that’s weird.” My stomach sinks. I had spilled tea all over this computer a few months ago. The bottom chassis was replaced, but maybe something hadn’t been. My next on-call shift is coming up in three days. “ugh,” I think. “macOS 26 has been unreliable , it did update 2 nights ago.” It shuts down fine, I let go, I press the button again, it starts up fine. I log in, start a terminal up, type in claude , press return. I want to see what I need to do using /adhd . It starts to slow down, again . Even cd is crawling . “huh.” I open Activity Monitor and see memory pressure in the red. “that’s weird, i wonder what’s causing that.” I scroll through the processes list and see: hundreds of CC instances . I start to put 2 + 2 together: slow computer last night, “oh,” hot chassis, “huh,” memory pressure red, “oh no no no no no,” chassis still hot, “well, shit.” Some mistakes in life you realize right away, others go unnoticed. This was the latter kind. want to hear more of my unhinged rants? drop your email. Rewind: Late Night/Early Morning # “wtf” I think to myself as my terminal starts to slow down at 2AM. “ugh, i’m going to bed, i’ll figure this shit out tomorrow.” The SessionStart hook I’d just created spawns 2 background CC instances using claude -p ... , each of which follows the normal start-up sequence. I get up from my desk. I walk away from my terminal for the night. Friday, Feb 27, ~11:00AM # I try to force quit every instance of CC in the Activity Monitor. They spawn faster than I can kill them. ghostty + pkill will work better but ghostty is unresponsive. The realizations continue. “SHIT SHIT SHIT” repeating in my head as my hand bolts for the power button and I force restart the machine. “you dumbass.” I berate myself. Every instance of CC starts two more CC instances. I created a hook that causes an explosion…1 → 2 → 4 → 8 → 16 → 32 → 2^N… I open ~/.claude/settings.json and remove the hook. I have Activity Monitor open, it’s filtering down to claude . I open another ghostty instance and type in claude . Before hitting enter, I rest my free hand’s index finger on the power button, I hit return with the other; everything’s fine, just a single instance. I breathe easy. It took me almost two decades, but at that moment I realized I had created my first fork bomb . It had completely bricked my computer ‘cause it ran
title_zh: 意外用Claude Code创建了我的第一个fork炸弹
summary_zh: 2026年2月，一位工程师因使用Claude Code意外创建了首个fork bomb，并产生了3800美元的Claude API账单。事件始于2月27日上午11点左右，作者发现电脑完全无响应且机身发热，强制重启后登录系统，打开终端输入claude命令时，系统再次变慢。检查Activity Monitor发现内存压力显示为红色，并有数百个CC（Claude Code）进程实例。，作者意识到问题源于前一晚（2月27日凌晨2点）创建的SessionStart钩子（hook）。该钩子使用claude -p命令在后台生成两个CC实例，而每个实例又会遵循正常启动序列，导致进程指数级增长：1→2→4→8→16→32→2^N，形成典型的fork bomb。由于进程生成速度远超终止速度，即使尝试通过Activity Monitor强制退出或使用ghostty + pkill命令，系统仍无法响应，最终只能强制重启机器。，问题解决后，作者从~/.claude/settings.json中移除了故障钩子，并谨慎地重新测试claude命令，确认系统恢复正常。此次事件不仅导致电脑暂时“变砖”，还因API调用激增产生了高额账单。作者反思称，这是自己近二十年来首次意外创建fork bomb，突显了在自动化工具（如Claude Code）中设置递归或自复制钩子时可能带来的风险。

title: anthropics/claude-code - Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

Dismiss alert anthropics / claude-code Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 14.6k Star 97k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 573 Commits 573 Commits .claude-plugin .claude-plugin .claude/ commands .claude/ commands .devcontainer .devcontainer .github .github .vscode .vscode Script Script examples examples plugins plugins scripts scripts .gitattributes .gitattributes .gitignore .gitignore CHANGELOG.md CHANGELOG.md LICENSE.md LICENSE.md README.md README.md SECURITY.md SECURITY.md demo.gif demo.gif View all files Repository files navigation Claude Code Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows -- all through natural language commands. Use it in your terminal, IDE, or tag @claude on Github. Learn more in the official documentation . Get started Note Installation via npm is deprecated. Use one of the recommended methods below. For more installation options, uninstall steps, and troubleshooting, see the setup documentation . Install Claude Code: MacOS/Linux (Recommended): curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash Homebrew (MacOS/Linux): brew install --cask claude-code Windows (Recommended): irm https: // claude.ai / install.ps1 | iex WinGet (Windows): winget install Anthropic.ClaudeCode NPM (Deprecated): npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code Navigate to your project directory and run claude . Plugins This repository includes several Claude Code plugins that extend functionality with custom commands and agents. See the plugins directory for detailed documentation on available plugins. Reporting Bugs We welcome your feedback. Use the /bug command to report issues directly within Claude Code, or file a GitHub issue . Connect on Discord Join the Claude Developers Discord to connect with other developers using Claude Code. Get help, share feedback, and discuss your projects with the community. Data collection, usage, and retention When you use Claude Code, we collect feedback, which includes usage data (such as code acceptance or rejections), associated conversation data, and user feedback submitted via the /bug command. How we use your data See our data usage policies . Privacy safeguards We have implemented several safeguards
title_zh: Anthropic/Claude Code - Claude Code是一款智能终端编程工具，它能理解您的代码库，通过自然语言指令执行常规任务、解释复杂代码、处理Git工作流，从而帮助您提升编程效率。
summary_zh: Anthropic公司在GitHub上开源了Claude Code项目，这是一个基于命令行的智能编码工具。它能够深入理解用户的代码库，并通过自然语言指令帮助开发者提升编码效率。该工具可直接在终端、IDE或GitHub平台上（通过@claude标签）使用。，Claude Code的核心功能包括：执行日常编码任务、解释复杂代码逻辑、以及处理git工作流。用户只需用自然语言描述需求，例如“为当前文件添加错误处理”或“解释这个函数的算法”，工具即可自动完成相应操作。其“智能体”特性体现在能够结合代码库上下文进行精准操作，而非简单的代码片段生成。，安装方式已从早期的npm安装转为更稳定的系统级安装方案。推荐方法包括：MacOS/Linux系统使用curl脚本安装，Windows系统使用PowerShell脚本安装，也可通过Homebrew或WinGet包管理器安装。用户安装后进入项目目录运行`claude`命令即可启动。，该项目支持插件扩展机制，开源仓库中提供了多个官方插件，用户可通过自定义命令和智能体进一步扩展功能。社区支持方面，开发者可通过内置的`/bug`命令直接提交问题反馈，也可参与GitHub Issues讨论或加入Discord开发者社区进行交流。，关于数据使用，Anthropic明确说明会收集使用反馈数据（包括代码接受/拒绝记录、相关对话内容及bug报告），这些数据将用于改进产品，同时公司承诺已实施隐私保护措施。详细政策可查阅官方数据使用说明文档。

Vibing , a voice-powered input method, is now built on top of VibeVoice-ASR. Download: macOS | Windows 1.mov 2026-03-06: 🚀 VibeVoice ASR is now part of a Transformers release ! You can now use our speech recognition model directly through the Hugging Face Transformers library for seamless integration into your projects. 2026-01-21: 📣 We open-sourced VibeVoice-ASR , a unified speech-to-text model designed to handle 60-minute long-form audio in a single pass, generating structured transcriptions containing Who (Speaker), When (Timestamps), and What (Content), with support for User-Customized Context. Try it in Playground . ⭐️ VibeVoice-ASR is natively multilingual, supporting over 50 languages — check the supported languages for details. 🔥 The VibeVoice-ASR finetuning code is now available! ⚡️ vLLM inference is now supported for faster inference; see vllm-asr for more details. 📑 VibeVoice-ASR Technique Report is available. 2025-12-16: 📣 We added experimental speakers to VibeVoice‑Realtime‑0.5B for exploration, including multilingual voices in nine languages (DE, FR, IT, JP, KR, NL, PL, PT, ES) and 11 distinct English style voices. Try it . More speaker types will be added over time. 2025-12-03: 📣 We open-sourced VibeVoice‑Realtime‑0.5B , a real‑time text‑to‑speech model that supports streaming text input and robust long-form speech generation. Try it on Colab . 2025-09-05: VibeVoice is an open-source research framework intended to advance collaboration in the speech synthesis community. After release, we discovered instances where the tool was used in ways inconsistent with the stated intent. Since responsible use of AI is one of Microsoft’s guiding principles, we have removed the VibeVoice-TTS code from this repository. 2025-08-25: 📣 We open-sourced VibeVoice-TTS , a long-form multi-speaker text-to-speech model that can synthesize speech up to 90 minutes long with up to 4 distinct speakers. — accepted as an Oral at ICLR 2026! 🔥 Overview VibeVoic
title_zh: 微软/VibeVoice - 开源前沿语音人工智能
summary_zh: 微软开源项目VibeVoice是一个前沿的语音AI研究框架，旨在推动语音合成领域的协作。该项目包含多个核心组件，重点关注语音识别（ASR）和实时文本转语音（TTS）技术。，VibeVoice-ASR是一个统一的语音转文本模型，其突出特点是能够单次处理长达60分钟的长篇音频，并生成包含说话人（Who）、时间戳（When）和内容（What）的结构化转录。该模型原生支持超过50种语言，并允许用户提供自定义上下文以优化识别效果。其微调代码已开源，并支持通过vLLM进行更快的推理。该模型已被集成至Hugging Face Transformers库，便于开发者直接调用。开源社区已开始采用该技术，例如语音输入法Vibing就构建于VibeVoice-ASR之上。，在语音合成方面，项目开源了VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B模型，这是一个支持流式文本输入的实时文本转语音模型，能够生成稳健的长篇语音。该模型已添加了实验性说话人，包括九种语言（如德语、法语、日语等）的多语言语音和11种不同风格的英语语音。此前，项目还曾发布过VibeVoice-TTS，这是一个长篇多说话人TTS模型，能合成长达90分钟、最多包含4个不同说话人的语音，该工作已被ICLR 2026接收为口头报告。需要注意的是，出于对AI负责任使用的考虑，微软已从代码库中移除了VibeVoice-TTS的代码。，总体而言，VibeVoice项目通过开源先进的语音识别与合成模型，为研究和应用社区提供了强大的工具，并特别强调了处理长篇音频和实时流式生成的能力。

summary_zh: GitHub项目“claude-code-best-practice”是一个专注于提升Claude AI在编程环境中应用效果的实践指南库，其核心理念是“实践使Claude臻于完美”。该项目由开发者shanraisshan维护，已获得29.9k星标，体现了社区的广泛关注。，项目系统地组织了一系列最佳实践，旨在帮助开发者更高效地利用Claude进行代码编写、调试和项目开发。其核心架构围绕几个关键概念构建：子代理（Subagents）、命令（Commands）、技能（Skills）、工作流（Workflows）和钩子（Hooks）。子代理作为独立的自主执行者，拥有自定义工具、权限和持久身份；命令是用于工作流编排的简单提示模板；技能则是可配置、可自动发现的知识模块，支持上下文分叉和渐进式披露。项目还集成了模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器，用于连接外部工具、数据库和API，并支持通过插件市场分发功能包。，技术特点上，项目提供了分层配置系统、权限管理、模型配置、沙箱环境以及可自定义的状态栏，用于显示上下文使用情况、模型和成本等信息。它强调“上下文工程”和“代理工程”，通过CLAUDE.md文件和规则目录实现持久化记忆管理，并具备基于Git的自动检查点功能，支持文件编辑跟踪和回退操作。，该资源库的价值在于为开发者提供了一个结构化、可扩展的框架，将Claude深度集成到开发工作流中，通过模块化设计提升AI辅助编程的可靠性、可控性和效率，是探索AI编程助手前沿应用的实用参考。

Get Started in 15 Minutes What Can You Build With This? FAQ Contributing License The Problem You installed Claude Code. You ran a few prompts. Now what? The official docs describe features — but don't show you how to combine them. You know slash commands exist, but not how to chain them with hooks, memory, and subagents into a workflow that actually saves hours. There's no clear learning path. Should you learn MCP before hooks? Skills before subagents? You end up skimming everything and mastering nothing. Examples are too basic. A "hello world" slash command doesn't help you build a production code review pipeline that uses memory, delegates to specialized agents, and runs security scans automatically. You're leavi
title_zh: luongnv89/claude-howto - 从基础概念到高级智能体，通过可视化示例驱动指南和即用模板快速掌握Claude代码开发。
summary_zh: GitHub项目“luongnv89/claude-howto”是一个面向Claude Code的视觉化、示例驱动的综合指南。该项目旨在帮助用户从基础概念快速过渡到掌握高级代理（agents）的构建与应用，其核心价值在于提供了大量可直接复制粘贴的模板，让开发者能立即获得实用价值。，该项目精准定位了开发者在学习Claude Code时面临的普遍痛点：官方文档仅孤立介绍功能，缺乏如何将斜杠命令（slash commands）、记忆（memory）、钩子（hooks）、子代理（subagents）以及模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器等功能组合成高效工作流的实战指导。同时，缺乏清晰的学习路径和超越“Hello World”级别的深度示例，导致学习者难以构建可用于实际生产的复杂应用。，为此，“claude-howto”提供了结构化的解决方案。它包含一个详细的功能目录和循序渐进的学习路线图，引导用户从斜杠命令入门，逐步学习记忆管理、技能（skills）创建、多代理协作、MCP集成等高级主题。项目内容以丰富的视觉教程和实际代码示例呈现，覆盖了构建自动化代码审查流水线、集成安全检查等真实场景。，其核心特点包括：模块化的知识组织，将复杂概念分解为可管理的章节；提供即用型模板，极大降低了上手门槛；以及强调功能间的组合与集成，教授用户如何打造能真正节省时间的智能工作流。该项目在GitHub上已获得大量关注（14.8k星），成为Claude Code开发者快速提升技能的重要实践资源。

If you want Codex in your code editor (VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf), install in your IDE. If you want the desktop app experience, run codex app or visit the Codex App page . If you are looking for the cloud-based agent from OpenAI, Codex Web , go to chatgpt.com/codex . Quickstart Installing and running Codex CLI Install globally with your preferred package manager: # Install using npm npm install -g @openai/codex # Install using Homebrew brew install --cask codex Then simply run codex to get started. You can also go to the latest GitHub Release and download the appropriate binary for your platform. Each GitHub Release contains many executables, but in practice, you likely want one of these: macOS Apple Silicon/arm64: codex-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz x86_64 (older Mac hardware): codex-x86_64-apple-darwin.tar.gz Linux x86_64: codex-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz arm64: codex-aarch64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz Each archive contains a single entry with the platform baked into the name (e.g., codex-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl ), so you likely wa
title_zh: OpenAI/Codex - 在终端中运行的轻量级编码助手
summary_zh: OpenAI在GitHub上开源了Codex项目，这是一个轻量级的编码代理，可直接在终端中运行。用户可以通过npm或Homebrew等包管理器全局安装，安装命令分别为`npm install -g @openai/codex`和`brew install --cask codex`。安装后，在终端输入`codex`即可启动该工具。，Codex的核心定位是一个本地运行的AI编程助手。它基于OpenAI的模型，旨在理解自然语言指令并执行相关的编码任务，例如生成代码、解释代码片段或协助完成开发工作流。项目提供了多种安装方式以满足不同用户的需求：除了终端CLI版本，开发者还可以在VS Code、Cursor等代码编辑器中安装插件以获得集成体验，或通过运行`codex app`命令使用桌面应用程序。，该项目在GitHub上获得了极高的关注，拥有超过7.1万个星标和近1万个分支，显示了开发者社区的浓厚兴趣。仓库结构清晰，包含了CLI工具、Rust实现、SDK、文档以及用于构建和测试的配置文件（如Bazel和pnpm）。发布版本为不同平台提供了预编译的二进制文件，包括macOS（Apple Silicon和x86_64架构）和Linux（x86_64与arm64架构），用户可直接从GitHub Release页面下载对应的压缩包使用。，Codex的价值在于将强大的AI编程能力引入本地开发环境，提供了一种快速、便捷的交互方式，帮助开发者直接在终端中提升编码效率，而无需依赖云端服务的网络延迟或复杂的配置过程。
